title: cynanchum gerrardi subsp. gerrardi
intro: Cynanchum gerrardi subsp. gerrardi, also known as Gerrard's cordia or Gerrard's swallowwort, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Cynanchum gerrardi subsp. gerrardi include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. Cynanchum gerrardi subsp. gerrardi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and decoctions.
